subject: Welcome to QVC: Your New Home for Culinary & Style
body: Welcome to the world of QVC! We're thrilled to partner with you on your shopping journey. With QVC AI, you have personalized recommendations and exclusive access to the best in kitchen, home, and beauty. Remember to download our app, set your preferences, and check out today's special value to get the most out of your membership. Let's make this your most stylish year yet!

subject: Inside Today's Special Value: Le Creuset Signature Series
body: Discover why Le Creuset is the gold standard in premium cookware. Today's Special Value features the 3.75-qt Signature Cast-Iron Oval Casserole at an unbeatable price. With a wide cooking surface and easy-clean enamel interior, it's the versatile multitasker every kitchen needs. Check your dashboard today to see available colors and take advantage of Easy Pay options.

subject: Don't Miss the Dyson Week Finale!
body: Clean smarter, not harder. Our Dyson Event is coming to a close, and you don't want to miss our final offers on the V15 Detect and Purify Cool systems. Experience the power of laser illumination and HEPA filtration with exclusive QVC bundles. Log into your account today to find the perfect cleaning solution for your home and enjoy free shipping on all Dyson orders.

subject: Save Time and Money with Auto-Delivery
body: Never run out of your beauty and wellness favorites again! With QVC's Auto-Delivery program, you can have your regular skincare, vitamins, and pantry essentials delivered right to your door on a schedule that works for you. It's convenient, reliable, and locks in today's great price for future shipments. Enroll online today through your order history and never worry about reordering again.

subject: Join QVC Rewards and Earn on Every Purchase
body: Get rewarded for shopping! The QVC Rewards Program lets you earn points for every dollar you spend. Whether you're upgrading your kitchen with KitchenAid or refreshing your wardrobe with Dooney & Bourke, your purchases add up to big savings. Redeem your points for gift cards, exclusive discounts, or free shipping. Sign up for free through the QVC mobile app and start earning today.
